title: Medical Devices - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada applies the Food and Drug Regulations and the Medical Devices Regulations under the authority of the Food and Drugs Act to ensure that the pharmaceutical drugs and medical devices offered for sale in Canada are safe, effective and of high quality.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to information on legislation and guidelines related to medical devices.
Acts and Regulations
- Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) - Schedule F
- Notices and Early Consultation - There are no current notices or early consultations
- Canada Gazette Part I
- Canada Gazette Part II
